name: Tooltip
description: A hover-triggered hint overlay that provides additional context for an element. Use for icon-only buttons, truncated text, or any UI element that benefits from a brief explanation.
instructions: Compose as Tooltip.Root > Tooltip.Trigger + Tooltip.Content. Use asChild on Tooltip.Trigger to forward tooltip behavior onto a custom element (e.g. a Button). Default enter delay is 700ms — use enterDelay=0 for immediate display. Tooltip.Content appears on hover; use Flyout for click-triggered contextual panels with richer content.
